generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance MotorActuationSystem : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Electronic Speed Controller (Vedder ESC) that converts voltage-based speed commands into motor control signals for propulsion, adhering to ISO 15622 Performance Class I ACC standards."
]

instance SteeringServoActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Lower-level chassis steering servo system controlled via ROS2 nodes for directional adjustment of the autonomous vehicle."
]

// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "High-resolution 3D LiDAR sensor (Hokuyo UST-10LX) providing real-time point cloud data for environmental perception."
    DTDFVocab:producedData LiDARPointCloudDataTransmission
]

instance IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel Deepsense D435i depth camera providing supplementary visual data including object detection and tracking."
    DTDFVocab:producedData DepthCameraDataTransmission
]

instance VehicleStateSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Onboard sensors (implied wheel encoders/IMUs) providing real-time ego vehicle state data (speed, steering angle) processed by NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano."
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleStateDataTransmission
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Data Transmission
instance LiDARPointCloudDataTransmission : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR
    base:desc "Real-time transmission of raw LiDAR point cloud data via ROS2 middleware with 100ms clock synchronization."
]

instance DepthCameraDataTransmission : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera
    base:desc "Event-driven depth camera data streams transmitted via ROS2 for object detection and tracking."
]

instance VehicleStateDataTransmission : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleStateSensor
    base:desc "Clock-synchronized (100ms accuracy) transmission of ego vehicle state data via ROS2 for ACC processing."
]

instance ObjectTrackDataTransmission : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom DataPreProcessingFunctionalEntity
    base:desc "Processed object tracks data transmitted from Physical Twin Entity to Digital Twin Entity via ROS2."
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance PointCloudClusteringTrackingModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "DBSCAN clustering algorithm combined with Kalman Filter for object detection and trajectory prediction from LiDAR data."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataPreProcessingFunctionalEntity
]

instance ActuationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Motor voltage-to-speed conversion model based on Vedder ESC specifications for real-time actuation commands."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ActuationFunctionalEntity
]

instance ACCControlLogicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "ISO 15622-compliant Adaptive Cruise Control logic model for lead vehicle detection and speed regulation."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ControllingFunctionalEntity
]

instance ThreeDVisualizationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "3D rendering model for visualizing object tracks, vehicle state, and projected driving path."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo VisualizationPreProcessingFunctionalEntity
]

instance RawLiDARPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Unprocessed 3D point cloud data from Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR stored temporarily for processing."
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARPointCloudDataTransmission
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataPreProcessingFunctionalEntity
]

instance ProcessedObjectTracksData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Filtered and clustered object tracks data derived from raw sensor inputs, stored in SQL database."
    DTDFVocab:fromData ObjectTrackDataTransmission
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ReportGenerationFunctionalEntity
]

instance VehicleStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Processed ego vehicle state data (speed, steering angle) synchronized with object tracks for ACC processing."
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleStateDataTransmission
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ControllingFunctionalEntity
]

instance TimeSeriesReportData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Human-readable time-series reports generated from processed data for post-analysis storage in SQL database."
    DTDFVocab:fromData ReportGenerationFunctionalEntity
]

// C11: Enablers
instance ROS2Middleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Robot Operating System 2 providing inter-node communication and system orchestration for all entities."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService, ReportGenerationService
]

instance WiFiCommunication : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Wi-Fi (UDP/TCP) protocol enabling cross-system communication between Physical Twin Entity, Digital Twin Entity, and User Entity."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataTranslationFunctionalEntity
]

instance SQLDatabaseStorage : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Structured SQL database for storing processed data and generated reports with query capabilities."
    DTDFVocab:enables ReportGenerationService
]

instance NVIDIAJetsonOrinNano : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano microcomputer providing real-time processing capabilities for sensor data and actuation commands."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataPreProcessingFunctionalEntity, ActuationFunctionalEntity
]

instance DataPreProcessingFunctionalEntity : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Functional entity implementing DBSCAN clustering and Kalman filtering for raw sensor data processing."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance VisualizationPreProcessingFunctionalEntity : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Functional entity preparing data for 3D visualization including object tracks and vehicle state."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance DataCollectionFunctionalEntity : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Functional entity aggregating processed data from Physical Twin Entity for Digital Twin operations."
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance ReportGenerationFunctionalEntity : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Functional entity generating human-readable time-series reports from processed data."
    DTDFVocab:enables ReportGenerationService
]

instance ControllingFunctionalEntity : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Functional entity executing ISO 15622-compliant ACC logic for speed regulation and emergency braking."
    DTDFVocab:enables RemoteManagementService
]

instance ActuationFunctionalEntity : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Functional entity translating control commands to actuation signals for motor and steering systems."
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance DataTranslationFunctionalEntity : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Cross-system functional entity ensuring compatibility between entities via ROS2 and Wi-Fi protocols."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance ThreeDVisualizationFunctionalEntity : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Functional entity rendering 3D visualization of object tracks, vehicle state, and driving path."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance ControlPanelFunctionalEntity : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Remote UI control panel enabling enable/disable, speed adjustment, and emergency braking operations."
    DTDFVocab:enables RemoteManagementService
]

// C6: Services
instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization service providing 3D visualization of ego vehicle state, object tracks, and projected driving path via UI and control panel."
    DTDFVocab:provides EgoVehicleStateVisualizationInsight, ObjectTrackVisualizationInsight, DrivingPathProjectionInsight
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service delegating ACC logic (lead vehicle detection, speed calculation) from constrained vehicle hardware to Digital Twin Entity."
    DTDFVocab:provides LeadVehicleDetectionAction, SpeedRegulationAction
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service enabling full remote control over ACC operations including enable/disable, speed adjustment, and emergency braking via remote UI."
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCOperationControlAction, EmergencyBrakingAction
]

instance ReportGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service automatically generating human-readable time-series reports for object tracks and vehicle state stored in SQL database."
    DTDFVocab:provides ObjectTrackReportInsight, VehicleStateReportInsight
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance EgoVehicleStateVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of vehicle speed and steering angle data in 3D environment."
]

instance ObjectTrackVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "3D visualization of detected and tracked objects with trajectory prediction overlays."
]

instance DrivingPathProjectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Projection of planned driving path based on current vehicle state and detected obstacles."
]

instance LeadVehicleDetectionAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic detection and tracking of lead vehicle in ACC scenario."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance SpeedRegulationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Continuous speed adjustment to maintain safe following distance from lead vehicle."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ACCOperationControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Remote enable/disable and speed adjustment commands for ACC system operations."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EmergencyBrakingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Immediate braking intervention triggered by critical safety conditions."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ObjectTrackReportInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Structured report containing time-series data of all detected and tracked objects."
]

instance VehicleStateReportInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Comprehensive report of vehicle state parameters including speed, steering angle, and acceleration."
]

// C12: Entities
instance PhysicalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Vehicle-hosted entity managing sensors and actuators with Data Pre-Processing and Actuation Functional Entities."
    base:contains HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR, IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera, VehicleStateSensor, DataPreProcessingFunctionalEntity, ActuationFunctionalEntity
]

instance DigitalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Cloud/edge-hosted entity executing ACC logic, data processing, and visualization services."
    base:contains VisualizationPreProcessingFunctionalEntity, DataCollectionFunctionalEntity, ReportGenerationFunctionalEntity, ControllingFunctionalEntity
]

instance UserEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Remote UI entity providing 3D visualization and control panel for ACC operations."
    base:contains ThreeDVisualizationFunctionalEntity, ControlPanelFunctionalEntity
]

// C13: Entity Relationships
instance EntityCommunicationLink : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "ROS2-based communication channel with Wi-Fi (UDP/TCP) for data transmission between Physical Twin Entity and Digital Twin Entity."
]

instance EntityUserCommunicationLink : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Wi-Fi-based remote control interface enabling user interaction with ACC system."
]

// C14: Environment
instance AutonomousVehicleEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Operational environment for the 1/10-scale autonomous vehicle including road conditions and traffic scenarios."
    base:contains HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR, IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera, MotorActuationSystem, SteeringServoActuator, PhysicalTwinEntity
]

instance DigitalTwinCloudEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Cloud/edge hosting environment for Digital Twin Entity processing and storage components."
    base:contains DigitalTwinEntity, SQLDatabaseStorage, ROS2Middleware, WiFiCommunication
]

instance UserInterfaceEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Remote user interface environment for monitoring and control operations."
    base:contains UserEntity
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The virtual-to-physical interaction includes:
   - **Control signals** from the **Digital Twin Entity's Controlling FE** (ACC logic) to the **Physical Twin Entity**, specifying **desired speed** (in volts) for motor actuation and **emergency braking commands**.
   - **Remote management commands** (enable/disable ACC, modify desired speed) transmitted via **ROS2** and **Wi-Fi** to the **Physical Twin Entity**, which executes these commands through the **Actuation FE**.
   - **Latency-bound responses** with an **end-to-end delay ≤ 100 ms** (as per **3GPP 22.185**) to ensure real-time responsiveness for safety-critical operations."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin operates at **real-time synchronization** with the physical twin, ensuring:
   - **Perception cycles** aligned with sensor data acquisition (unspecified frequency but sufficient for **LiDAR/Depth Camera fusion**).
   - **Control loop latency ≤ 100 ms** (as per **3GPP 22.185**) for **ACC actuation**, with **clock synchronization accuracy of ±100 ms** across all components.
   - **Event-driven updates** for object tracks and vehicle state, processed at **millisecond-scale granularity** to support real-time decision-making."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin constellation is structured as a **distributed, entity-based system** following **ISO 23247**, with the following orchestration:
   - **Physical Twin Entity** (onboard vehicle): Hosts **sensors (LiDAR, Depth Camera)**, **actuators (motor, steering servo)**, and **pre-processing FEs** (DBSCAN, Kalman Filter).
   - **Digital Twin Entity** (cloud/edge): Executes **ACC logic (Controlling FE)**, **data collection (Data Collecting FE)**, and **visualization pre-processing (Presentation FE)**.
   - **User Entity** (remote): Provides **3D Visualization FE** and **Control Panel FE** via a **web-based UI**, enabling remote monitoring and management.
   - **Cross-System Entity**: **Data Translation FE** ensures seamless data exchange between entities via **ROS2** (intra-entity) and **Wi-Fi** (inter-entity), with **serialization/deserialization** for heterogeneous data formats. The system adheres to **modularity principles**, with each FE implemented as an **independent ROS2 package** for scalability."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin operates across **design and operational phases** of the automotive system lifecycle. During the **design phase**, it serves as a **cyber-physical experimentation facility** for validating ACC logic and system behavior. During **vehicle operation**, it enables **real-time monitoring**, **remote management**, and **computation offloading** for optimization and safety-critical tasks. The DT does not explicitly cover **predictive maintenance** or **fuel economy optimization**, which are referenced as external use cases in the background but not implemented in this case study."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin ensures fidelity and validity through:
   - **Real-time synchronization** (≤100 ms latency, ±100 ms clock accuracy) to maintain temporal consistency.
   - **ROS2 Quality of Service (QoS) policies** implicitly enforced by the middleware to prioritize critical data streams.
   - **No explicit uncertainty quantification** is mentioned in the documents, though the system relies on **Kalman filter-based tracking** for object detection, which inherently models uncertainty.
   - **Verification and validation** are implicitly addressed through adherence to **ISO 15622** (ACC standards) and **3GPP 22.185** (latency requirements)."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin employs **ROS2** for intra-entity communication (within the PT and DT) and **Wi-Fi** for inter-entity communication (between PT and DT). The **Data Translation FE** serializes and aligns data streams using **ROS2 message types** (no explicit mention of UDP/TCP or JSON/XML protocols). Security considerations (e.g., encryption, replay attack prevention) are **not addressed** in the documents."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin is hosted and deployed across multiple platforms:
   - **Physical Twin Entity**: Deployed **onboard the PT** (Jetson Orin Nano microcomputer).
   - **Digital Twin Entity**: Deployed on an **external device** (e.g., cloud/edge server) to offload computation and store data externally.
   - **User Entity**: Deployed in a **web browser** or standalone application for visualization and control. The **SQL database** for data storage is hosted on the external device."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system does not explicitly describe **horizontal integration** with external information systems beyond:
    - **ROS2** for middleware integration with potential third-party tools (e.g., simulation environments).
    - **MATLAB/Simulink** for complex system modeling, which may interface with external simulation tools (e.g., **CREO Simulate** for predictive maintenance, referenced externally).
    - **SQL databases** for storing data, which could theoretically integrate with enterprise systems (not detailed in the document).
    No active integration with external DTs or third-party systems is described."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin adheres to the following standards:
   - **ISO 23247**: **Part 2 (Reference Architecture)** as the foundational framework, with adaptations (e.g., introduction of **Physical Twin Entity**).
   - **ISO 15622**: **Adaptive Cruise Control (ACC) performance standards** for the **Controlling FE** implementation.
   - **3GPP 22.185**: **Vehicle-to-Vehicle (V2V) communication requirements**, including **100 ms latency** and **clock synchronization (±100 ms)**.
   - **IEC 62541 (OPC UA)**: **Not explicitly used**, but mentioned as a potential alternative for **Data Translation FE** implementation in the standard.
   - **ROS2**: **Industry-standard middleware** for robotics and autonomous systems, ensuring interoperability."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin incorporates **safety considerations** through:
   - **Real-time latency constraints** (≤100 ms) to ensure timely response to critical events (e.g., emergency braking).
   - **Clock synchronization** (±100 ms) for event ordering and data integrity.
   - **Human-in-the-Loop** design (Fully Autonomous Digital Twin with operator oversight) to mitigate risks.
   **Security considerations** (e.g., encryption, authentication, replay attack prevention) are **not addressed** in the documents."
]
